channel.title: Promedic Product Feed
channel.description: Promedic - ED Medications and OTC Pharmacy

item.g:title: Buy Cetirizine 10mg (45ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Cetirizine HCl 10mg (45 count) online. 24-hour OTC allergy relief for sneezing, runny nose, itchy/watery eyes, and hives. Same as Zyrtec. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy Cialis Online USA
item.g:description: Buy Cialis (Tadalafil) online in USA — the 36-hour ED pill. 5mg daily & 20mg on-demand. FDA-approved, discreet delivery to all 50 states. Competitive prices.

item.g:title: Buy Acetaminophen 500mg (100ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Acetaminophen 500mg tablets (100 count) online. Effective OTC pain reliever and fever reducer, gentle on the stomach. Order from Promedic US licensed pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Aspirin 325mg (100ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Aspirin 325mg tablets (100 count) online. OTC pain reliever for headaches, arthritis, and fever — plus cardiovascular protection. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy DayQuil LiquiCaps (24ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy DayQuil LiquiCaps (24 count) online. Non-drowsy daytime relief for cold and flu symptoms including fever, congestion, cough, and body aches. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy Diphenhydramine 25mg (24ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Diphenhydramine HCl 25mg (24 count) online. OTC antihistamine for allergy symptoms and nighttime sleep aid. Same as Benadryl. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Ibuprofen 200mg (100ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Ibuprofen 200mg tablets (100 count) online. Fast-acting NSAID for headaches, muscle pain, back pain, arthritis, and fever. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Kamagra Online USA
item.g:description: Order Kamagra 100mg online in USA. Same active ingredient as Viagra at a lower cost. Tablets & Oral Jelly available. Discreet shipping to all 50 US states.

item.g:title: Buy Levitra Online USA
item.g:description: Order Levitra (Vardenafil) online in USA. Works in 25 minutes, effective 4-5 hours. 10mg & 20mg. FDA-compliant, discreet delivery to all 50 US states.

item.g:title: Buy Loperamide 2mg (24ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Loperamide HCl 2mg (24 count) online. Fast-acting OTC anti-diarrheal medication. Controls and relieves acute diarrhea symptoms. Same as Imodium A-D. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy Loratadine 10mg (30ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Loratadine 10mg (30 count) online. Non-drowsy 24-hour OTC allergy relief for hay fever, pet allergies, and seasonal allergies. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Meclizine 25mg (30ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Meclizine HCl 25mg (30 count) online. OTC relief for motion sickness, dizziness, and vertigo. Same as Bonine. Less drowsy than Dramamine. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy MiraLax Laxative (30 doses) Online
item.g:description: Buy MiraLax Polyethylene Glycol 3350 laxative (30 doses) online. Gentle, stimulant-free constipation relief. Works with your body naturally. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Mucinex Guaifenesin 400mg (20ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Mucinex Guaifenesin 400mg extended-release tablets (20 count) online. Thins and loosens chest congestion for easier coughing. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Naproxen Sodium 220mg (80ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Naproxen Sodium 220mg (80 count) online. Long-lasting 12-hour OTC anti-inflammatory for arthritis, back pain, muscle aches, and menstrual cramps. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy NyQuil Cold & Flu Liquid (12oz) Online
item.g:description: Buy NyQuil Cold & Flu Relief liquid (12oz) online. Nighttime relief for cold and flu symptoms including fever, sore throat, cough, and congestion. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy Omeprazole OTC 20mg (42ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Omeprazole OTC 20mg (42 count) online. 24-hour treatment for frequent heartburn and acid reflux (GERD). Proton pump inhibitor. Order from Promedic US pharmacy.

item.g:title: Buy Phenylephrine HCl 10mg Tablets (24ct) Online
item.g:description: Buy Phenylephrine HCl 10mg tablets (24 count) online. Fast OTC nasal decongestant for sinus pressure and stuffy nose relief. Same as Sudafed PE. Order from Promedic.

item.g:title: Buy Generic Sildenafil Online USA
item.g:description: Buy FDA-approved generic Sildenafil online in USA. Same ingredient as Viagra, up to 90% cheaper. 25mg, 50mg & 100mg. Discreet delivery to all 50 states.

item.g:title: Buy Spedra Online USA
item.g:description: Order Spedra (Avanafil) online in USA. The fastest ED medication — works in 15-30 minutes. 100mg & 200mg. US licensed pharmacy, discreet delivery.

item.g:title: Buy Viagra Online USA
item.g:description: Order genuine Viagra (Sildenafil Citrate) online in USA. FDA-approved 25mg, 50mg & 100mg tablets. Discreet packaging, fast delivery to all 50 states. US licensed pharmacy.
